CustomField.formula: IF( SYSCodeRedFlag__c = "Red",IMAGE( "/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004a1JY", "RedFlag"), IF( SYSCodeRedFlag__c = "Blue",IMAGE( "/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004a1Jd", "BlueFlag"), IF( SYSCodeRedFlag__c = "Gray",IMAGE( "/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004a1Jx", "GrayFlag"), IF( SYSCodeRedFlag__c = "Amber",IMAGE( "/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015b0000004a1Jn", "YellowFlag"), ""))))
CustomField.label: Code Red Flag
